stories.headline: Anthropic Accidentally Releases Source Code for Claude AI Agent
stories.summary: Anthropic accidentally released approximately 512,000 lines of internal source code — roughly 1,900 files — from its Claude Code assistant via a leaked npm package source map. The leak revealed that Claude Code contains routines that scan user prompts for signs of frustration, raising significant privacy and trust concerns. Fortune also reported that Anthropic had been storing thousands of internal files, including a draft blog post about an upcoming model codenamed 'Mythos', on a publicly accessible system.

stories.headline: DOJ Appeals to Restore Anthropic Ban as Government Vendors Face Uncertainty
stories.summary: The Trump administration attempted to ban Anthropic's AI from federal government use after the Pentagon declared Anthropic a supply chain risk when the company refused to allow its products to be used for surveillance of Americans or in lethal autonomous warfare. A federal judge blocked the ban on March 26, but the DOJ filed an appeal to restore it. Government vendors and agencies are now navigating significant uncertainty about whether they can continue using Claude-based tools.

stories.headline: Claude AI Maker Anthropic Considers IPO as Soon as October, Eyes $60B+ Raise
stories.summary: Anthropic executives have begun early discussions with Wall Street banks about a potential initial public offering as soon as Q4 2026. Bankers expect the company to raise more than $60 billion in its IPO, which would rank among the largest tech listings in history. This comes alongside surging revenue momentum — Anthropic more than doubled its annualized revenue to $19 billion by March 2026, driven largely by Claude Code adoption.

stories.headline: Claude Dethroning ChatGPT and Gemini as Top AI in 2026 Benchmarks
stories.summary: Claude has outperformed ChatGPT and Google Gemini across a rigorous 2026 benchmark gauntlet, signaling a major shift in AI industry standing. On prediction market Kalshi, traders placed 54% odds on Claude becoming the best AI overall, compared to 10.9% for ChatGPT and 24.9% for Gemini. The results are attributed to Claude's strength in grounded, high-precision reasoning and its Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 model releases.

stories.headline: Claude Code Gets Major Feature Wave: Computer Use, Remote Sessions, and 128k Output
stories.summary: Claude Code received a substantial wave of new capabilities in March and April 2026, including computer use for agentic tasks, auto mode, and remote cloud sessions that can follow PRs and fix CI failures. The latest release also raises maximum output token limits to 128,000 for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6, adds PowerShell support on Windows, and introduces new hook events and an interactive '/powerup' tutorial system. These updates position Claude Code as a rapidly maturing autonomous coding agent.
